title: MoreSnowballls
description: This is a mod that adds more snowballs to Minecraft，You can use it to have snowball fights with your best friends！
body:
## 🗺 Synopsis:
This is a snowball with 16 different kinds added！
They can give both entities and players some effects, some can deal huge damage to entities, and some support snowballs！
The mod also adds a number of items, all of which are synthetic.


 ### Future updates planned:
1. Add more snowballs;
2. Linkage with other modules;
3. Add more entities;

### Author's words:
Finally, thank you for the download and play experience, if there are bugs or better suggestions, welcome to the comment area! ^_^!

## ⚠Urgent notice：
This mod was forced to stop due to damage to the work area:(
